creator: mita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
gdevbitps-1.0.tar.gz is necessary to compile jp-vfghostscript-4.03 packages.
I have asked to put it to ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/FreeBSD/distfiles/ when I
contributed jp-vfghostscript4 ports, but not yet.

Fix: 

So, can you put gdevbitps-1.0.tar.gz at Mr. Asami or Mr. Nakane's machine
to ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/FreeBSD/distfiles/ ? I'm sure they have it.
Yoroshiku onegai shimasu(in Japanese).
